response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of full-stack engineering experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js alignment and direct AI agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) at re:cinq — a precise match for the role's AI agent requirement. His track record spans production systems at scale (Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/sec, Optilyz sending millions of direct mails), open-source testing framework authorship, and a demonstrated TDD/craftsmanship culture across multiple roles. The primary gaps are NestJS (not mentioned anywhere), Kotlin (only Java referenced), and no explicit Vitest or Playwright usage, alongside a current caregiving career gap since October 2025.
strengths: Direct AI agent development experience with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js full-stack production experience across multiple companies with measurable scale (Optilyz, Dunnhumby, RIDE Capital)
Strong testing culture: authored the Fluent-Asserts testing library, practiced TDD/pairing/trunk-based dev, and led multiple testing workshops publicly
concerns: NestJS is absent from the entire resume despite being the primary backend framework in the required stack
Kotlin not mentioned; only Java appears in a skills list with no recent or substantive hands-on Kotlin evidence
Current career gap since October 2025 and the immediately preceding role lasted only 6 months (April–October 2025), raising continuity questions
